prompt: Create a raw vertical smartphone photo meme with an intentionally imperfect low-end Android camera look, as if captured accidentally in the middle of a crowded Indonesian bird-singing competition under a roofed outdoor venue. The scene is packed with people standing shoulder to shoulder beneath many hanging round bird cages suspended from the ceiling, with leafy green trees and harsh daylight filtering through the background. In the foreground, a pale, tattooed young man with messy silver-white hair wearing a faded sleeveless dusty-pink shirt is caught mid-celebration with a clenched fist near the camera, motion-blurred from excitement; his face and several nearby faces are covered by flat brown rectangular censorship blocks. To the right, a man in a bright yellow T-shirt and black cap points upward toward the cages while the crowd reacts around him. Include a partially visible event banner in the background reading “LATBER” with smaller Indonesian event text, slightly obstructed by people and motion blur. Add large centered meme caption text near the top in bold white sans-serif with thick black outline, reading POV kicau mania: burungmu mulai gacor pas dinilai juri. Make the image feel candid, chaotic, compressed, noisy, slightly wide-angle, awkwardly framed, with bad autofocus, uneven lighting, blur at the edges, and realistic phone-camera artifacts rather than a polished staged photo.
